issue_summary: Introduced "MatrixDimensionMismatchException" to replace "InvalidMatrixException" whenever it was used to signal a row or column dimension mismatch. "MessageFactory": Fixed wrong order of appearance of general and specific messages.
code_before:
void setRowVector(int row, FieldVector<T> vector)
       throws MatrixIndexException, InvalidMatrixException;
javadoc_before: /** * Sets the entries in row number row * as a vector. Row indices start at 0. * * @param row the row to be set * @param vector row vector (must have the same number of columns * as the instance) * @throws MatrixIndexException if the specified row index is invalid * @throws InvalidMatrixException if the vector dimension does not match one * instance row */
javadoc_after: /** * Sets the entries in row number row * as a vector. Row indices start at 0. * * @param row the row to be set * @param vector row vector (must have the same number of columns * as the instance) * @throws MatrixIndexException if the specified row index is invalid * @throws org.apache.commons.math.exception.MatrixDimensionMismatchException * if the vector dimension does not match one instance row. */
